message:
The other day, I found myself staring at a half-empty bag of chips and a single can of soup in my pantry. The skies were turning dark, and I suddenly realized I had zero provisions for the storm heading our way. 

I couldn’t help but chuckle at my own lack of preparedness. Picture me, hunkered down with a snack, hoping for the best like it’s movie night instead of a potential weather event! 

After a quick run to the store (with half the city doing the same, of course), I got my act together with some essentials. It was a reminder that sometimes, we can find humor in our little mishaps while still getting ready for what nature throws at us. 

So, what’s your funniest unprepared moment? Have you ever been caught off guard by a storm?
